zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de  Zouche於1242年9月29日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Alan la Zouche I I37歲，母親Helen Quincy19歲。他於1266年與Ela Longespée在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年10月15日在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Adrien.
from Old French bosche ‘large bundle of firewood’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a seller of such bundles.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de  Zouche was born on 29 September 1242, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Alan la Zouche I I, was 37 and his mother, Helen Quincy, was 19. He married Ela Longespée in 1266, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 15 October 1285, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de  Zouche est né le 29 septembre 1242, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Alan la Zouche I I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helen Quincy, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ela Longespée en 1266, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1285, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de  Zouche am 29. September 1242 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan la Zouche I I 37 und seine Mutter Helen Quincy 19. Er hat 1266 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Ela Longespée geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1285 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de  Zouche è nato il il 29 settembre 1242 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Alan la Zouche I I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Helen Quincy, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ela Longespée nel 1266, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1285, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de  Zouche(이)가 1242년 9월 29일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan la Zouche I I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Quincy(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Ela Longespée(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 10월 15일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de  Zouche nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1242, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan la Zouche I I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helen Quincy, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Longespée em 1266, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1285, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de  Zouche родился 29 сентября 1242 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan la Zouche I I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Quincy, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Longespée в 1266 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1285 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de  Zouche nació el 29 de septiembre de 1242, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan la Zouche I I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Helen Quincy, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ela Longespée en 1266, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1285, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
